category_sources: source_facts.description says MCP Server for Notion; official GitHub repository describes the project as the Official Notion MCP Server.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is Notion MCP Server; source_facts.name is notion-mcp-server.
docs_sources: Official Notion developer docs provide Notion MCP documentation; official GitHub README documents the local MCP server package.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and official GitHub page identify makenotion/notion-mcp-server as the official repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Notion MCP server; official GitHub README says it implements an MCP server for the Notion API and lists TypeScript as the implementation language.
